title: Miró. Las huellas del olvido
overview: In the north of the pampas, the remains of a population lie hidden  under the soil; they’ve been this way for more than a century. Their  casual discovery is the starting point with which the film tries to  puzzle out that mystery. There where soy reigns, one more battle is  fought in the constant struggle of film against oblivion.
